title: Kenyan Sweet Yam Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful stir fry dish made with yams and a blend of spices.
instructions: Peel and chop the yams into 1-inch pieces.
Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the grated ginger and cook for an additional minute.
Add the yams and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until they begin to soften.
In a small bowl, whisk together the coconut cream and kenyan spice blend.
Pour the coconut cream mixture over the yams and stir to combine.
Continue cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the yams are tender.
Stir in the grated sweet potato and cook for an additional minute.
